title: centaurea × senneniana
intro: Centaurea × senneniana, also known as Sennen's Centaury, is a hybrid plant species in the family Asteraceae, resulting from the cross between Centaurea montana and Centaurea corymbosa. Traditionally, Centaurea × senneniana has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. Centaurea × senneniana can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
